text:
〔……言っておく〕
〔我はまだ〕〔貴様を認めていない〕〔馴れ合うつもりも〕〔ない〕

〔だが〕〔恩義は返す〕〔それが〕〔我らの誇り〕
〔ただそれだけ〕〔勘違いするな〕
……なんだか素直じゃないなあ。

……べ、べべっ、べつに！
何でもないわよ、何でも！

〔この先で〕〔貴様を待っている〕〔だが〕〔ダーカーも〕〔増えている〕
〔せいぜい〕〔気を付けるんだな〕

……あいつは！
凍土にいた仮面野郎！
ちっ、面倒なタイミングで現れやがって……！

〔貴様〕〔何者だ〕
〔龍族の領域に〕〔無断で踏み入るとは〕
<%me>……貴様を殺す。

ど、どう見ても、見逃してくれるって雰囲気じゃあないわよね？
すごく、おっかないんだけど……

〔<%me>〕
〔そして、その輩〕〔貴様達は〕〔先に進め〕
〔この無礼者とは〕〔我が〕〔戯れよう〕
……邪魔をするなら殺す。

〔ハ！〕〔面白い！〕
〔我らの力〕〔その身に刻め！〕

〔<%me>！〕
〔邪魔だ！〕〔さっさと行け！〕

(Let me be clear.) (I still have yet) (to accept you.)
(I am not here) (to make friends with you.)

(But) (repaying debts) (is a point of pride)
(for us.) (That's all there is to it.)
(Don't get any funny ideas.)
...Yeaaah, I've heard that line before.
(What was that?)
N-N-N-Nothing! Nothing at all!
(Hmph.)

(You are expected) (just beyond here.)
(But) (there are) (more Falspawn.)
(Try to watch) (yourself.)
Hey! It's the masked bastard from the Tundra!
Of all the times for them to show their ugly face...

(You.) (Who are you?) (How dare you enter
Draconian territory) (without permission?)
...I will kill you.
Well, uh, I guess we're not just walking away from this. Talk about intimidating...
(You and) (those ones.) (You all can) (proceed onward.)
(I will teach) (this rude lout) (some manners.)
Get in my way, and I'll kill you.

(Hah!) (That's a good one!) (Maybe a proper
beating will) (teach you to respect us!)
(Begone!) (You bother me!)
